site.name: Al-Askari Holy Shrine
site.subtitle: Shrine of Imams Ali al-Hadi and al-Hasan al-Askari (pbut)

hero.cta: Contribute to the service of the Holy Shrine and support its construction and expansion projects

footer.about: Al-Askari Holy Shrine in Samarra, the shrine of Imams Ali al-Hadi and al-Hasan al-Askari (pbut). We strive to serve visitors and support construction, restoration, and expansion projects.

stories.featuredTitle:
Contributing to the Shrine's
Restoration is an Irreplaceable Honor
stories.featuredBody: Among our people and families, we believe every believer deserves to see the Holy Shrine in its finest form — without money being a barrier. Every donor deserves to know their contribution is laying a stone in this great edifice. Giving is a right, because the shrine belongs to everyone.
stories.story1Detail1: This phase includes expanding the sacred courtyard by an additional 2,000 square meters to accommodate larger numbers of visitors and pilgrims arriving from around the world.
stories.story1Detail2: The project includes developing access corridors and improving visitor services, while preserving the authentic architectural character of the Holy Shrine.
stories.story2Detail1: The golden dome reconstruction project aims to restore its authentic splendor and brilliance, using the finest gold and heritage materials according to modern engineering standards.
stories.story2Detail2: The executing team includes elite engineers and craftsmen specializing in Islamic architectural heritage, ensuring the spiritual and historical identity of the shrine is preserved.
stories.story3Detail1: The project includes modernizing the electricity, lighting, and air conditioning systems across all parts of the shrine, along with upgrading water and sewage networks to serve millions of visitors annually.
stories.story3Detail2: It also involves building integrated service centers, parking facilities, and pedestrian walkways to provide a safe and comfortable visit experience befitting the stature of the Holy Shrine.

aboutPreview.title: About Al-Askari Holy Shrine
aboutPreview.p1: Al-Askari Holy Shrine in Samarra is one of Islam's most revered shrines, housing the remains of Imams Ali al-Hadi and al-Hasan al-Askari (pbut), attracting millions of visitors annually.
aboutPreview.p2: We work tirelessly to preserve this noble Islamic heritage and develop construction, restoration, and expansion projects so the shrine reflects its sacred status in the hearts of believers.
